title: Finite Jordan-Chain Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Jordan-chain bad nilpotent-image component QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact Jordan-chain replay computes the first component of (A - 2I)*v2 as 1 while the malformed row claims the same component is 0.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional Jordan-chain rows only when they add distinct generalized-eigenvector, nilpotent-part, multiplicity, or proof-route pressure; keep the Jordan normal form theorem, diagonalization criteria, and numerical eigensolver behavior in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed Jordan block, eigenvalue, nilpotent part, eigenvector, generalized eigenvector, nilpotent square, and reconstruction as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route false finite generalized-eigenvector component claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact component.
Expose the pack through matrix computation, spectral, operator, and characteristic-polynomial learner and consumer query surfaces.

Keep the general Jordan normal form theorem, algebraic/geometric multiplicity theory, diagonalization criteria, and numerical eigensolver behavior marked Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty until formal routes exist.
